docs.description: Keyboard key indicator rendered as an inline kbd element with terminal styling.

notes.title: Size Variants
notes.content: Available in sm and md sizes (defaults to md). Renders inline, designed for use inside text.

notes.title: Terminal Styling
notes.content: Rendered with a border and bg-secondary background for a terminal key-cap appearance.
